title: Guidelines for the Scheme for Manufacturing of Electric Passenger Cars in India (SMEC)
content: The Ministry of Heavy Industries has issued guidelines dated 2nd June 2025 for the Scheme to Promote Manufacturing of Electric Passenger Cars in India (SPMEPCI), aimed at attracting global EV manufacturers, fostering domestic production, and reducing import duties in exchange for significant local investments. Applicants must commit a minimum of â‚¹4,150 crore, with a cap on total import duty concessions at â‚¹6,484 crore. The number of imported electric cars allowed is proportionate to the investment and import value, with clear eligibility conditions, investment accounting rules, and limits on components like land and royalties. Investments must be focused on manufacturing and may include ER&D and public fast-charging infrastructure under specified criteria.
author: Analysts Account
